name: Steak in Red Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the steaks to remove any excess fat, and set aside.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet or saute pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add the steaks and sear on each side for 1 minute.
4. Reduce the heat to medium-high, and cook the steaks for 2 to 3 minutes on one side for rare meat, or longer to taste.
5. Remove the meat from the pan and place it on a serving platter in a 200°F oven to keep warm.
6. Pour off the grease, and place the pan over medium heat.
7. Add the butter and saute the shallots and garlic, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes.
8. Raise the heat to medium-high, add the wine, stock, and thyme, and cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Pour the sauce over the steaks. Serve immediately.
